name: Performance Engineer Pack
description: Workflows for coding agents optimizing performance: profiling and hotspot analysis, load testing, Core Web Vitals via browser devtools, observability-driven measurement, and root-cause debugging of regressions.
useCases: Profile application hot paths and prioritize measurable performance fixes.
Design load, stress, and regression tests tied to service-level objectives.
Investigate web or backend latency regressions using traces, metrics, logs, and benchmarks.
Review performance-sensitive changes for resource use, caching, concurrency, and release risk.
examplePrompts: Profile this performance issue and identify the highest-impact code, query, or caching fixes.
Design a load test plan with traffic model, metrics, thresholds, fixtures, and failure criteria.
Investigate this latency regression using available traces, metrics, logs, and recent changes.
Review this change for performance risk, including memory, CPU, I/O, caching, and concurrency.
